title: $about
text: $about Returns information about the current Uniface installation, version, and platform. $about Return Values Table 1. Information returned by $about Property Description Example tag Not used N/A update Not used N/A track Full Uniface version number, including the build identifier 10.3.01.007 (007 1027_1 date Build date December 14, 2018 config Build configuration identifier 1004_1 platform Platform compatibility code, such as W10, LU7, or RSG. For details, see Platform Availability Matrix in the Rocket Community Forum. W10 version Uniface version number 10.3.01 Use Allowed in all component types. Description The $about function returns an associative list of properties and their values, which describe the current Uniface installation. You can include this information in an About dialog, commonly available from the Help menu of most applications. Example: Using $about The following code displays an information dialog with the Uniface version, build, and date. trigger detail variables string vVersion string vBuild string vBuildDate endvariables getitem/id vVersion $about "version" getitem/id vBuild $about "config" getitem/id vBuildDate $about "date" askmess/info "Uniface version: %%vVersion%%% (%%vBuild%%%) %%^Date: %%vBuildDate%%%", "OK" end Copy Figure 1. Information Returned by $about Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
